###Render URL
https://csc3916-assignment2-pdpx.onrender.com 



###Tests summary
The postman has the tests for all the routes both passing ones and failing ones.
Signup - has a pass tests and a fail test
Signin - has a pass tests and a fail test
POST movies - has a pass tests and a fail test
PUT movies - has tests with and without JWT
DELETE movies - has tests with and without JWT
GET movies - has a pass test
All other routes -  has a test that return 405
